title: bus.agent.watchdog v1
description: Fire-and-forget alert emitted by tengine's agent_flow_watchdog.py when a live agent transcript trips one of the 7 flow_analyze pathology flags (a-g, e.g. instrument-bypass, silo-launch-without-verify). Always also appended to ~/.tengine/agent_watchdog.jsonl; this bus emit is the live-fanout copy (skipped when NERVOUS_WATCHDOG_DISABLE=1 or `nervous` is not on PATH). Source: scripts/dispatch/agent_flow_watchdog.py.

session_id.description: Claude Code session id of the flagged agent.

display.description: Human-readable display name for the session (title/summary).

worktree.description: Worktree path or slug the agent is running in.

flags.description: Pathology flags fired this cycle, from flow_analyze's 7-flag (a-g) taxonomy (e.g. instrument-bypass).

flags_summary.description: Comma-joined flags, convenience field for log lines.

total_tool_calls.description: Tool calls observed in the analyzed tail window.

silo_launches.description: GPU silo launches observed in the tail window.

instrument_calls.description: Instrument/verification tool calls observed in the tail window.

transcript_path.description: Absolute path to the JSONL transcript that was analyzed.
